headline: Moody's (MCO) Expands Intapp Partnership To Put Risk Data Inside AI Workflows
summary: Intapp, Inc. and Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) are expanding their partnership to integrate Moody's financial risk intelligence into Intapp's AI platform. The integration will embed Moody's data into Intapp's Celeste agentic AI for legal, private capital, and accounting professionals. The collaboration aims to align with emerging open standards and broaden access to Moody's analytics within client workflows. For investors following Moody's, this move highlights how the company is looking...
